endpoints.name: Presence in a location aggregated by age
endpoints.description: Get count of people in a given location and an hour, aggregated by age.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{LOCATION}} with a real location.

endpoints.name: Presence in a location aggregated by gender
endpoints.description: Get count of people in a given location and an hour, aggregated by gender.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{LOCATION}} with a real location.

endpoints.description: Information about versions of application and data.
